report.summary: Built two comprehensive learn guides: TEE & Verifiable Compute Guide 2026 (Flashbots, Phala, Oasis, Secret Network, hardware security) and Solana DeFi Ecosystem Guide 2026 (Jupiter, Kamino, Jito, Raydium, Drift, $9B+ TVL). Both pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: TEE & Verifiable Compute: Over 50 teams building TEE-based blockchain projects. TEEs (Intel SGX, AMD SEV, ARM TrustZone) enable confidential smart contracts at near-native hardware speeds. Key projects: Flashbots Sirrah (MEV-protected block building in SGX), Phala Network (migrated to Ethereum L2, processed 3.73B LLM tokens via GPU TEE), Oasis Network (multi-layered security resilient to hardware exploits), Secret Network (confidential smart contracts). Security concerns: Battering RAM and Wiretap attacks in 2025 compromised Intel SGX and AMD SEV-SNP. TEEs complement ZKPs and FHE with different speed vs trust tradeoffs.

Solana DeFi Ecosystem 2026: TVL exceeded $9B (900% YoY growth from Q1 2025), SOL-denominated TVL hit ATH at 80M SOL. Stablecoins dominate at $13.45B (43% of TVL). Jupiter processes $700M+ daily swap volume with Ultra Mode V3 MEV protection. Kamino leads lending at $2.8B TVL. Jupiter Lend reached $1.65B TVL within months of August 2025 launch. Jito captures MEV value for enhanced staking yields; VanEck filed for first US JitoSOL Liquid Staking ETF. Drift offers sub-400ms perpetual futures execution.

sections.title: Content Created
items: TEE & Verifiable Compute Guide 2026 (~3000+ words, 8 sections): What are TEEs, how they work in crypto, TEEs vs ZKPs vs FHE comparison table, key projects (Flashbots, Phala, Oasis, Secret, Marlin), real-world use cases, security risks & vulnerabilities, future of verifiable compute, 6-question FAQ. Includes info boxes, comparison tables, internal links.

Solana DeFi Ecosystem Guide 2026 (~3500+ words, 8 sections): Big picture ($9B TVL, growth stats), DEX trading (Jupiter/Raydium/Orca comparison), lending (Kamino/Jupiter Lend rates table), liquid staking (Jito/Marinade/Sanctum + ETF filing), perpetual futures (Drift vs CEX comparison), yield strategies, risks & considerations, 6-question FAQ. Includes 3 comparison tables, info boxes, internal links.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: tee-verifiable-compute-guide: Title 'TEE & Verifiable Compute Guide 2026 — Trusted Execution Environments in Crypto | degen0x', target keywords: TEE crypto, trusted execution environment blockchain, verifiable compute, confidential smart contracts. Article + FAQ schemas (6 questions). Internal links to /learn/fhe-crypto-guide-2026, /learn/mev-protection-guide, /learn/zero-knowledge-proofs, /learn/ai-crypto-agents-guide, /tools/mev-scanner.

solana-defi-ecosystem-guide-2026: Title 'Solana DeFi Ecosystem Guide 2026 — Top Protocols, TVL & Opportunities | degen0x', target keywords: Solana DeFi, Solana DeFi ecosystem 2026, Jupiter Solana, Kamino Finance, Jito staking. Article + FAQ schemas (6 questions). Internal links to /learn/jupiter-solana-guide, /learn/best-perpetual-dex-guide, /learn/stablecoin-yield-strategies-2026, /learn/liquid-staking-derivatives, /tools/staking-apy, /tools/defi-yields.
Both pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES in src/lib/published-pages.ts (Day 67 batch)
